prompt: Create a cinematic, realistic 4:3 landscape photograph of two young people lying on their backs in a dry golden wheat field at sunset, viewed from a very low angle among tall grass stems in the foreground. The scene should feel quiet, nostalgic, and intimate, with warm late-afternoon backlight, hazy sun flare from the upper left, soft film grain, shallow depth of field, and muted earthy colors. The person on the left wears a loose white short-sleeve shirt and lies slightly farther back with one arm bent near the head; the person on the right wears a white sleeveless floral top and lies closer to the camera, partially cropped at the lower edge. Their bodies are relaxed and partly hidden by wheat stalks. Place exactly two opaque dark brown rectangular censor blocks over their faces, one centered over each face, with no visible facial features. In the background, show an expansive rural field, a dark tree line, soft distant hills, and exactly three thin utility or communication poles rising on the horizon. Use natural imperfect framing, foreground grass blur, golden-hour rim light, and a documentary fashion-photography look. No text, no watermark, no extra people.
